asset_name: Speech Bubble — Seed Request Icon (for Hungry state)
shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale on the 128x128 playfield.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the interface crisp without hiding gameplay.
differences: This bubble asset pairs the hunger state with a direct seed request symbol.
The bubble must read clearly against the cream background and cage bars.
The icon inside the bubble must stay visible without text.

reference_images.label: hud_widget_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds HUD layout, icon sizing, and bottom-screen information density.

reference_images.label: care_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds care popup behavior, icon semantics, and interaction feedback states.

reference_images.label: relationship_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds relationship label semantics and progression display needs.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Static sprite entity with fixed virtual-pixel scaling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load bubble_seed_request_icon.png via AssetServer during Loading state, then bind handles by task_id for deterministic system lookup.
runtime_notes: Use nearest-neighbor sampling and a 128x128 virtual canvas so every authored pixel remains crisp after upscale.
Drive state swaps through atlas index changes or visibility toggles instead of runtime repainting to preserve palette invariance.
Attach marker components so CareSystem, BehaviorSystem, TimeSystem, and HUD systems can target the asset without filename inference.

context.usage: Shows above Echo when hungry; contains seed icon.

acceptance_criteria: Bubble is exactly 20x16px with a 1px border (#1D2B53) and solid fill (#FFF1E8).
Tail points downward-left and stays inside bounds; tip pixel is at (6,15).
Centered seed icon fits in a 12x12 area and uses only #FFEC27 and #AB5236 (outline may use #1D2B53).
